review_title: The best time tracking system found!
description: In general is it a complete solution that allows for saving time and money. Many reports are available, easy to use, and a way for timesheet approval by Supervisors and employees.
author: José F.
pros: Easy to use, fast deployment, several types of clock devices available, integration with third-party applications, online synchronization.
cons: A multi-site implementation needs to be well-defined.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Managmant of staff and identifying work hot spots
description: Very good overall, was worth the effort setting it up and it certainly allowed us to monitor workloads and identify weaknesses in our users.
author: Mark J.
pros: We were able to identify where work that was scheduled for a period of time was either done within the time period or exceeded it. In both cases the evaluation led to a higher degree of accuracy in costing work.
cons: Some areas involving setting up clients and cost centres and task was technical. A simpler dashboard would be beneficial. Menus were also a little confusing, having to jump from one area to another, this would be better if it was in a logical order.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: On a day to day it is fine but every month at the end of the month (we get paid once a month) it is a nightmare trying to submit my timesheet.
author: Leah G.
pros: It is easy to log in and out from your phone. It has multiple languages for users.
cons: The end of the month reports are bad, I can never approve my report without help. Our workplace has a lot of flexibility with work days and hours and the system is not flexible. I am an 80% worker and my time clock is set for me to work 4 days a week. If I choose to change one day my boss is fine with that but timeclock is NOT ok with it and will not let me submit my monthly report if a day is blank. This is very frustrating.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: no complaints
author: scott C.
pros: the ease of use for all employees. highly recommend
cons: honestly, there are no dislikes. i recommend this product
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

author: Einat M.
pros: The software is very easy to use and straight forward.
cons: The mobile app just doesn't function and keeps crashing in every use.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: Extremely Appealing GUI at Extremely Poor Support
description: Extremely poor to the point we were forced to take a loss of a few thousand dollar and move to another solution/
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: At first glance Timeclock 365 is extremely appealing and the fact is built on top of Microsoft 365 is just a huge plus.
cons: Unfortunately, the solution fails to deliver and support is on par with some of the worst received. Does not help the fact company is overseas so when they do reply is 12Hrs later problem is once purchased they reply 1/4 of the times and customer is left with a broken solution.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: In the beginning and during selling phase supplier was very responsive and convinced me to choose this product to implement across the company. After sometime and when I requested certain changes, replies were very slow or inexistent; or timelines quoted were too long so that you would not go for the changes you request. Communication with support is extremly poor. Support is based in Israel and do not cater for European working week Mon - Fri. What is worse is that support tickets were being closed on Sundays because I do not reply to them (Sunday is a weekend for us but not for them). Moreover, frequently one would find broken functionality after updates are implemented.
author: Dennis D.
pros: Feature rich product and flexible with fixed work patterns. Online and App are good options
cons: Does not support rotating shifts. Support is poor Testing from developers is poor - every time changes are uploaded I encounter broken functionality
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

description: Frustrating, infuriating, absurd. Timeclock 365 changed the way their payment processing appears in credit card statements. Our credit card company flagged the charge because it seemed suspicious to them. Without having had notice of the change or any email correspondence at the time the card was charged to know that this was legitimate, I told the credit card company it must have been a fraudulent transaction. Even after I reversed this once I discovered it was actually Timeclock 365, the customer service was absolutely awful. They turned off our access, took several days to communicate, and ultimately failed to provide any assistance. There is no phone number. You have to wait for their responses to come in overnight (I'm in Eastern Time) and those responses weren't even helpful so the cycle would continue again. I finally created my own internal timekeeping solution. DO NOT SUBSCRIBE if you're considering this product. THEY ARE AWFUL.
author: Sharon M.
pros: The product is ok. Our employees used it to punch in for time keeping and, as the administrator, I used it to run reports for payroll hours.
cons: Some features could be more intuitive and the fact that it's not US-based complicated some matters.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Very good experience, no issues at all. My employees all use it without any issues. Well worth the cost.
author: Kristin L.
pros: I like the ease of use and is very helpful with tracking the attendance of my employees. The customer service is very good as well. Anytime I have a question, I email and have a resolution within 24 hours.
cons: I have not really explored how to use the tracking of PTO for employees. I played around with it but will need to contact customer service for help on how to use it.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: So far a very good timeclock system for our small business
description: Overall has been a good program for our small business
author: Michelle D.
pros: The ease of use for our employees in enabling the clock in/out from their cell phones.
cons: The occasional random clock out of an employee and the lack of notification that they've been clocked out
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Kathleen A.
pros: The software was good for us as we are a small company and the fact that it integrated with MS Teams was a bonus.
cons: I logged into my account today and it was as if, I was a new user that had not set up anything. I could not see any employees, I could not see my profile details, I could not run reports, etc. I tried reaching the company through WhatsApp, no reply. I tried calling, the number is no longer a working number. I could not see our licenses. There is no one I can call. This is absurd.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: Mediocre
author: Lily M.
pros: it allows to track punch in/out and submit vacation requests
cons: There is no feedback on approved vacation; requesting vacation via mobile app is burdensome, it changes dates and makes it very tricky to pick right dates.GPS tracking does not work very well, most of the time we have no idea where our employees are.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

author: Isabella G.
pros: We love that the product is really easy to use and how it made us more constant in pout work.
cons: That we need a spanish version of the product.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: My overall experience has been excellent. It has saved me money to have accurate clocking of hours of my workers, especially because everyone leaves at different times.
author: Kristin F.
pros: I love the accuracy of this software. Having independent contractors working for me, it is easy to track everyone's hours. Whether they are day players or on a project for the duration.
cons: Some employees have complained about having to sign in and out everyday because of feeling like they are being tracked. I don't have a reason nor time to do this, however it is a concern.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

author: Jose J.
pros: The ease of use and inclusion of data and alteration of projects and activities as well as the reports are a highlight.
cons: During this evaluation period we did not find any significant points to include.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best Time Tracking I can Find
description: On a scale of 01-10, it's been a solid 8.
author: Yvonne J.
pros: I like that I can track my time on projects and that it is integrated with Microsoft Teams.
cons: I don't like that my employees cannot submit their timesheets for approval to their supervisors.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: I had really helpful customer care and they really helped with making the decision to use the app.
author: Nakita G.
pros: I appreciate the ability to use this software both on mobile as well as pc.
cons: I have absolutely no complaints. It’s great.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Solid!
author: Aiden C.
pros: Full suite of features, which is what we wanted from time tracking software. We needed it more for the vacation tracking than the time tracking, but it does both well.
cons: Ultimately management needed a different kind Microsoft Teams integration to make it work, so we had to switch. Other than that it was great.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Add more features with the trial
author: Meshari J.
pros: I have been looking for such a bunch of reports I can rely on, and found it in this software
cons: Nothing so far, it nice, but I want to try to integrate with SAP and see what challenges we might have down the road.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: It was only temporarily needed because it worked
description: It was okay because it did its job but I honestly didn't get to utilize all of the features. Employees fought using to avoid being held accountable. We were able to terminate an employee based on this.
author: Charles R.
pros: It held employees accountable for everything they did.
cons: third-party vendor customer support was terrible.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great option once up and running!
description: Very positive
author: Colleen B.
pros: links to quickbooks, can run and edit invoices from the software and run reports by team member
cons: It took a few months to iron out the kinks and get a smooth process set up so implementation took longer than expected but customer service was great.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: Don’t
author: Peter L.
pros: I can’t even get a refund because this company locked me in and locked me out. Rubbish.
cons: Support is rubbish. Test it is. Absolutely rubbish
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Not a fan
author: Jess A.
pros: I like the concept but it didn't fit for our company to utilize it
cons: It doesn't round very well. We billin 15 and 7 minutes and under is free. 8 minutes and up is 15 min. It wouldn't allow for this.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Fabricio V.
pros: Facilidade no uso e gestão objetiva das atividades do dia a dia.
cons: Impossibilidade de ações simultâneas .
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: What a great experience!
author: Johnny S.
pros: I liked how friendly and responsive the support was.
cons: Nothing to report here, it is the best experience
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
